A proclamation on Bullying Prevention Month, October 2024, whereas each October is National Bullying
Prevention Month, a nationwide campaign to call attention to the serious consequences of bullying
and to take an active role in its prevention. And whereas bullying and harassment and pervasive
problems at schools throughout our city, state, and our nation

[03:00–03:30]
With one in five students reporting they were bullied at school. And whereas bullying and harassment
cause lasting physical, social, and emotional harm to our children, including a much higher risk of
poor academic achievement, absenteeism, and dropping out of school. Therefore, be it resolved that
we, the school board of the Houston Independent School District, and the Superintendent of Schools,
do hereby proclaim October 2024 as bullying prevention month in.
